full_text:
He Xia (Yangshi) 和洽 (陽士)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Xia (和洽), styledYangshi (陽士), was born in Xiping, Runan. Complained about the overly strict moral principles applied to officers of Wei. He Xia was affiliated with Liu Biao and the Wei Kingdom.
